description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted display frame featuring three separate photo slots arranged vertically. The frame is constructed with a sleek, gray border and a white inner matting that highlights the photos. Each slot contains a vibrant image of autumn leaves in shades of red and orange, giving the object a decorative and seasonal appearance. The frame is relatively thin in depth, as seen from the side views, and has a solid, flat back panel. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban interiors such as hallways, lobbies, or waiting areas. The object does not have any visible doors, handles, or compartments, and is intended solely for displaying photographs or artwork.
description: A modern, gray-bordered wall-mounted photo frame with three vertically arranged autumn leaf images and a white matting.
description_view_0: Front view showing three photo slots with autumn leaf images and a gray border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the frame's thin profile and lack of depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, solid gray back panel with no visible mounting hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the frame.
